title: erythroxylum myrtoides
intro: Erythroxylum myrtoides, also known as the Brazilian coca or Bolivian coca, is a plant species in the Erythroxylum genus that is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Erythroxylum myrtoides include its ability to increase oxygenation of the body, reduce fatigue and stress, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of using Erythroxylum myrtoides include improved mental clarity, reduced anxiety and depression, and enhanced physical endurance. Erythroxylum myrtoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused in water, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of altitude sickness.
